types.description_en: Smooth and soft, the golden standard

colors.health_note_zh: 正常范围，可能与饮食有关
colors.health_note_en: Normal range, may relate to diet

colors.health_note_zh: 提示：若持续出现，建议咨询医生
colors.health_note_en: Caution: If persists, consult a doctor

colors.health_note_zh: 提醒：请留意，必要时就医检查
colors.health_note_en: Alert: Pay attention, see a doctor if needed

messages.text_zh: 今日出品的🍌香蕉君，标准得像教科书。建议裱起来。
messages.text_en: Textbook Gold Banana. Send this to your performance review.

messages.text_zh: 在家+咖啡=肠道高铁准点发车。今日带薪拉屎KPI已完成。
messages.text_en: WFH + coffee = gut on a bullet train. Today’s “meeting that could have been an email” ✅.

messages.text_zh: 🐑羊粪蛋，一颗一颗地来，像老板画的大饼，碎了一地。
messages.text_en: Sheep pellets, one by one. Like your boss’s “quick syncs” – scattered and painful.

messages.text_zh: 💦水枪喷射，注意避让。比周一早会还让人措手不及。
messages.text_en: Water gun mode. Less warning than a Monday morning deadline.

messages.text_zh: ⚫煤炭黑出没。如果不是吃铁剂，请把这张截图发给医生。
messages.text_en: Coal black. If you’re not on iron pills, screenshot this for your doctor – not your group chat.

messages.text_zh: 🔴红色警报！先别发朋友圈，去看医生。
messages.text_en: Red alert. Don’t post this on Slack. See a doctor.

messages.text_zh: 🥑绿到发光，昨天吃了多少菠菜？比你的基金还绿。
messages.text_en: Glowing green. Greener than your 401k after a bad week.

messages.text_zh: 🏢带薪拉屎像打仗，你赢了，但老板以为你在会议室对方案。
messages.text_en: Paid poop battle royale. You won, but your team thinks you’re in a strategy meeting.

messages.text_zh: 🚽公共厕所无声完成，你是忍者。省下的时间，够再摸鱼5分钟。
messages.text_en: Ninja flush in a public restroom. You just earned 5 extra minutes of quiet quitting.

messages.text_zh: 🌳野外拉屎，回归自然。比在工位被催进度舒服多了。
messages.text_en: Pooping in nature. Better than another “as per my last email.”

messages.text_zh: 熬夜+压力=拉不干净。身体在说：我想辞职，顺便带薪休假。
messages.text_en: Burnout + no sleep = unfinished business. Your gut is drafting a resignation letter.

messages.text_zh: 压力大时拉的屎都是一颗颗的，像你未完成的需求清单。
messages.text_en: Stress pellets. Shaped exactly like your never-ending to-do list.

messages.text_zh: ✈️旅行便秘/拉稀，肠道在抗议酒店的免费早餐。出差？那是换个地方拉屎。
messages.text_en: Business trip? Your gut hates the hotel breakfast. Also, you’re just pooping with extra steps.

messages.text_zh: 🌶️昨天火锅，今天喷泉。辣得进去，辣得出来。比甲方改需求还刺激。
messages.text_en: Yesterday’s hotpot, today’s fountain. Spicy in, spicy out. More intense than a last-minute client revision.

messages.text_zh: ☕咖啡一喝，肠道就开运动会。比钉钉消息还快。
messages.text_en: Coffee hits, gut sprints. Faster than your boss asking “got a minute?”

messages.text_zh: 💊吃药拉到黑？别怕，是铁剂在给你上色。停💊就白。
messages.text_en: Black poop from meds? Just iron painting the exit. Stops when you stop – unlike your work emails.

messages.text_zh: 药效还没到病处，先到马桶。副作用：免费冲洗肠道，还不用请假。
messages.text_en: Meds hit the toilet before your symptoms. Side effect: free colon cleanse, no PTO required.

messages.text_zh: 水土不服，屎都害羞得缩成小球。多喝水，它才能像你一样放开摸鱼。
messages.text_en: Travel tummy makes poop shy. Hydrate so it can slack off like you do on Friday afternoons.

messages.text_zh: 不知道为啥拉成这样？别纠结，记录完继续打工。
messages.text_en: No idea why? Don’t overthink. Log it and get back to the grind.

messages.text_zh: 拉完都没感觉，你失去了人生的一大乐趣——冲水前欣赏成果，就像验收项目。
messages.text_en: Didn’t even feel it. You missed the joy of admiring your work – like closing a ticket without testing.

messages.text_zh: 这一拉，拉走了今日所有烦恼。建议列为带薪拉屎标杆案例。
messages.text_en: That flush just washed away your whole week. Add this to your “wins” slide.

messages.text_zh: 感觉没拉完，就像周五下班前突然来的需求。明天请早。
messages.text_en: Unfinished, like a Friday 4:59 PM task. Try again tomorrow (after standup).

messages.text_zh: 完美的🍌香蕉君，悄悄来，悄悄走。深藏功与名，就像从不加班的同事。
messages.text_en: Perfect Gold Banana, silent exit. The quiet quitting champion.

messages.text_zh: 记录成功！你的每一次拉屎，都在为打工人的肠道数据做贡献。
messages.text_en: Logged! Every poop you take contributes to workplace wellness data (probably).

messages.text_zh: 🚗在交通工具上无感拉完？你是特种兵。下车记得检查座位，别给保洁添麻烦。
messages.text_en: Silent poop on the train? You’re a commuter ninja. Check the seat before you exit – don’t be that person.

messages.text_zh: ✈️在飞机/车上喷射？愿上帝保佑你旁边的乘客，以及你的年终奖。
messages.text_en: Explosive on a plane/train? God bless the passenger next to you and your next performance review.
